ddls:
CREATE TABLE "subjects" (
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subject */,
  "demographics" TEXT /* Demographic information (e.g., age, sex, weight) */,
  "medical_history" TEXT /* Medical history of the subject */,
  "consent_status" TEXT /* Consent status (e.g., 'given', 'not given') */,
  "consent_date" TEXT /* Date when the subject gave consent */,
  "study_group" TEXT /* Study group to which the subject belongs (e.g., control, treatment) */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date when the subject was enrolled in the study */,
  "withdrawal_date" TEXT /* Date when the subject withdrew from the study, if applicable */,
  "withdrawal_reason" TEXT /* Reason for withdrawal, if applicable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subject_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "time_points" (
  "time_point_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each time point */,
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subject to whom the time point belongs */,
  "time" REAL /* Time at which the measurement was taken */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the measurement was taken */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the time point */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("time_point_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_time_points_subject_id FOREIGN KEY ("subject_id") REFERENCES subjects ("subject_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement */,
  "time_point_id" INTEGER /* ID of the time point to which the measurement belongs */,
  "amt" REAL /* Amount of drug in the body */,
  "wgt" REAL /* Weight of the subject */,
  "apgr" REAL /* Area under the curve (AUC) */,
  "dv" REAL /* Derived metric (DV) */,
  "cv1" REAL /* Covariate 1 (CV1) */,
  "cv2" REAL /* Covariate 2 (CV2) */,
  "cv3" REAL /* Covariate 3 (CV3) */,
  "method" TEXT /* Method used to measure the drug concentration */,
  "instrument" TEXT /* Instrument used for the measurement */,
  "operator" TEXT /* Name or ID of the operator who performed the measurement */,
  "lab_location" TEXT /* Location where the measurement was performed */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_time_point_id FOREIGN KEY ("time_point_id") REFERENCES time_points ("time_point_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "covariates" (
  "covariate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each covariate */,
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subject to whom the covariate belongs */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the covariate */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the covariate */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the covariate */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the covariate data (e.g., patient record, lab test) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("covariate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_covariates_subject_id FOREIGN KEY ("subject_id") REFERENCES subjects ("subject_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "derived_metrics" (
  "derived_metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each derived metric */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement from which the metric was derived */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the derived metric */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the derived metric */,
  "method" TEXT /* Method used to calculate the derived metric */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the derived metric */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the derived metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("derived_metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_derived_metrics_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES measurements ("measurement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality" (
  "data_quality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality control record */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement to which the quality control record belongs */,
  "qc_result" TEXT /* Result of the quality control check */,
  "qc_method" TEXT /* Method used for quality control */,
  "qc_operator" TEXT /* Name or ID of the operator who performed the quality control */,
  "qc_date" TEXT /* Date when the quality control was performed */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the quality control */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_quality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES measurements ("measurement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, administrator) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department to which the user belongs */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the database */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., read, write) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Session ID of the access */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "covariate_values" (
  "covariate_value_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each covariate value */,
  "covariate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the covariate to which the value belongs */,
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subject to whom the value belongs */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the covariate */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the covariate value */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the covariate value data (e.g., patient record, lab test) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("covariate_value_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_covariate_values_subject_id FOREIGN KEY ("subject_id") REFERENCES subjects ("subject_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_covariate_values_covariate_id FOREIGN KEY ("covariate_id") REFERENCES covariates ("covariate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "derived_metric_values" (
  "derived_metric_value_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each derived metric value */,
  "derived_metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the derived metric to which the value belongs */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement to which the value belongs */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the derived metric */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the derived metric value */,
  "method" TEXT /* Method used to calculate the derived metric value */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the derived metric value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("derived_metric_value_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_derived_metric_values_derived_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("derived_metric_id") REFERENCES derived_metrics ("derived_metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_derived_metric_values_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES measurements ("measurement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysis_results" (
  "analysis_result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis result */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement to which the result belongs */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis performed */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the analysis */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date when the analysis was performed */,
  "analyst" TEXT /* Name or ID of the analyst who performed the analysis */,
  "method" TEXT /* Method used for the analysis */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysis_results_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES measurements ("measurement_id")
)
